insights: 40% of rejections (2/5) flagged facsimile_signature; these use terms 'Gold Edition', 'Made in USA', 'Signature Card'.
40% of rejections (2/5) flagged wrong_card_num; vague/generic titles like 'Group of noted' lack specificity.
20% of rejections (1/5) flagged wrong_parallel with multiple secondary reasons (wrong_year, other); title-card mismatch.
No confirmed good listings provided; blocklist based purely on rejection signals.
Facsimile signatures cluster around vintage-style or special edition cards (Leaf Exhibits, Gold Edition).
Wrong card/parallel rejections involve 2024–2025 modern releases with title-description mismatches.
Vague or overly broad titles correlate with wrong_card_num rejections.
